hero.headline: Your property sale, under your control.
hero.subline: Free owner dashboard. Market data. Comparable sales. Then send your brief to competing agents — and choose the best deal.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter your address and get a free owner dashboard with local market data, comparable sales, and a timeline for your sale.
howItWorks.step2Body: One click sends your Owner Brief to competing agents in your area. They respond with real proposals — commission, marketing plan, portal coverage.
howItWorks.step3Body: Pick the best agent. Once instructed, they connect to your dashboard so you see every viewing, offer, and update in real time.

paths.ownerBody: Get a free dashboard with market data and comparable sales. When you're ready, send your brief to agents and choose the best deal.
paths.hunterBody: Tell us what you're looking for. We'll match you with properties and keep you updated as new homes hit the market.
paths.agentBody: Receive Owner Briefs from motivated sellers in your area. Respond with your proposal and win the instruction — on merit, not marketing spend.

ctaBand.headline: Ready to take control of your sale?
ctaBand.body: Create your free dashboard in two minutes. No card required. No commission — ever.

auth.magicLinkSent: We sent you a link. No password needed.

roles.owner: Owner — I want to sell or rent
roles.hunter: Home Hunter — I'm looking to buy or rent

owner.title: My Properties
owner.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your listing is now being published.

services.heroTitle: Pay only for what you need. Keep the rest.
services.heroSubtitle: Start free. Modular services when you need them. No commission — ever. Prices vary by market and are always shown before payment.
services.addonsTitle: Optimize your listing with professional extras
services.addonsSubtitle: Available à la carte or as part of a package.

addons.title: Professional Photography
addons.description: Local photographers, available at short notice, edited HD images within 24 hours.

addons.title: 360° Virtual Tour
addons.description: Interactive 3D scan. Buyers explore your home before viewing.

addons.title: Floor Plan Creation
addons.description: Accurate, publication-ready floor plans. Required by IS24 for premium placement.

addons.title: Legal Support
addons.description: Notary referral, contract review and guidance at every milestone.

addons.title: For Sale Sign
addons.description: Branded sign delivered and installed. The #1 local lead generator.

addons.title: Portal Advertising
addons.description: IS24, Immowelt, ImmoNet. Automatic status synchronisation.

addons.title: Personal Support
addons.description: Dedicated Yalla adviser. Manages inquiries, negotiates, guides the sale.

addons.title: Viewing Calendar
addons.description: Live availability, buyers book themselves. 40% fewer no-shows.

services.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that suits you.
services.comparisonSubtitle: On a €400,000 property, traditional German agents charge 3–6% commission.
services.ctaBandTitle: Create your listing now — start free
services.ctaBandSubtitle: Create your listing in minutes. Choose your plan when you're ready.
